name: Allowance for 100% Blind
benefit_description: Pension of ₹2,000/- per month. *The existing beneficiaries who are on receipt of benefits under the scheme can continue to do so.
details: The scheme “Allowance for 100% Blind" is a Pension Scheme launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹2,000/- to the blind persons of Tripura aged 10 years and above having 100% blindness. The application should be submitted to the nearest Child Development Project Officer (CDPO).
eligibility_text: The applicant should be a resident of Tripura. The applicant should be 100% visually handicapped. The applicant's age should be 10 years and above. The annual income of the applicant's family should be up to ₹ 1,00,000/-.

eligibility_criteria.criterion: Must be a resident of Tripura
